creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text:
On FreeBSD 15-CURRENT, running "automount -c" causes instapanic.

FreeBSD pustak 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #72 main-n266317-f5b3e686292b: Thu Nov  9 15:12:45 GMT 2023     root@pustak:/usr/obj/usr/home/trasz/git/freebsd-src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64

panic: invalid vfs_ops count 0
